title: Crumbly British Cocoa Crumble
description: A fresh and crumbly weeknight dish featuring cocoa in a jain-friendly version.

ingredients.name: coarse oat flour or crushed gluten-free oats

instructions: In a bowl, mix coconut oil and cocoa powder until well combined.
Stir in brown sugar, flour, and salt. Mix well until the mixture is crumbly.
Fold in prunes or dates, making sure they are evenly distributed throughout the mixture.
Gently fold in oat flour and almond meal to create a thick, crumbly texture.
Transfer the crumble mix into a greased 8x8 inch baking dish.
Bake for about 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and crisp on top.
Let it cool before serving. Serve warm with whipped coconut cream if desired.
